issue_title: Tags not working for non-ASCII characters
issue_body_preview:
Looks like the regular expression for matching tags doesn't match unicode characters, as shown below:
![tag](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/4485522/16648152/3bd6fc3c-4465-11e6-81a6-e407bb9e4f26.PNG)
test_description_zh: 在笔记编辑器中输入包含非ASCII字符（如中文、日文、阿拉伯文等Unicode字符）的标签，观察标签是否能被正确识别和匹配显示。
expected_result_zh: 包含非ASCII/Unicode字符的标签应能被正确识别、匹配并显示为有效标签，与纯英文标签行为一致。
